testcase.name: verifyValidLogin

failure.message: Expected condition failed: waiting for visibility of Proxy element for: DefaultElementLocator 'By.xpath: //span[contains(text(), 'Yes')]' (tried for 10 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval)
